title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Godfather
overview: An organized crime dynasty's aging patriarch transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: Schindler's List
overview: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce.

title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Goodfellas
overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soapmaker form an underground fight club.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, Vietnam, Watergate, and other history unfold through the perspective of an Alabama man.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
overview: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring.

title: Star Wars: A New Hope
overview: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight, a cocky pilot, a Wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy.

title: Spirited Away
overview: A sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
overview: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to catch another serial killer.

title: Saving Private Ryan
overview: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper.

title: The Green Mile
overview: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a giant, g, black man accused of child murder.

title: Gladiator
overview: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.

title: The Departed
overview: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while both work for an Irish gang in South Boston.

title: Whiplash
overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor.

title: The Prestige
overview: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything.

title: Parasite
overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes a peculiar interest in the wealthy and naïve Park family.

title: Avengers: Endgame
overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins.

title: Joker
overview: A mentally troubled comedian embarks on a downward spiral of revolution and bloody crime.

title: La La Land
overview: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations.

title: Get Out
overview: A young African-American visits his white girlfriend's parents for the weekend, where his simmering uneasiness about their family grows.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure to save the world by exploring other universes.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
overview: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort, from his rise to a wealthy stock-broker living the high life to his fall.

title: Dune
overview: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for control over the galaxy's most valuable asset.

title: No Country for Old Men
overview: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash.
